description: A conservation scientist needs their browser configured for the upcoming field collection season. Remove all personal/entertainment bookmarks and organize the 20 remaining botanical/conservation bookmarks into four folders: 'Taxonomy', 'Seed Biology', 'Permitting', and 'Field Operations'. Configure custom search engines with keywords 'ipni' (URL: 'https://www.ipni.org/?q=%s') and 'wfo' (URL: 'https://list.worldfloraonline.org/search?query=%s'). Set the browser to download PDF documents automatically and change the default download location to /home/ga/Documents/Field_Season_2026/. Download USDA_PPQ_587.pdf, CITES_Export_App.pdf, and Field_Collection_Manifest.pdf from http://localhost:8080/permits/ to this directory.
